vulnerablePopulations: patients with delayed access to antibody testing and neuroimmunology services
epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: International NMOSD criteria with core clinical syndromes and antibody status; differentiation from MS is essential

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low to moderate; depends on access to plasmapheresis and maintenance immunosuppression

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: AQP4 testing and plasmapheresis concentrated in tertiary centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Relapse steroids and plasmapheresis; maintenance immunosuppression (rituximab/azathioprine) in specialist care
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Cost barriers and uneven access to specialized neuroimmunology services
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Growing tertiary neurology services and increasing access to antibody testing in urban centers
